title: Bill Donovan
compiled_truth: Bill Donovan is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-08-16 to 2002-02-25), Bill Donovan sent 12 and received 124 emails, totalling 136 interactions. Top correspondents: [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (7), [J  Kean](people/j-kean) (4), [Jeffrey Mcmahon](people/jeffrey-mcmahon) (3), [Deborah Bubenko](people/deborah-bubenko) (2), [Christina Yepez](people/christina-yepez) (2). Mailbox folders observed: aadepartment, administrative, budget, inbox.
